design_philosophy.core_concept: Editorial Cosmic. A blend of high-fashion magazine layouts and mystical depth.
design_philosophy.visual_style: Dark Void. Not flat black, but deep, rich, noise-textured darkness with jewel-tone light leaks.
anti_patterns: No flat solid backgrounds without texture or subtle gradient.

rules: Headings must strictly use 'Playfair Display' or 'Cormorant Garamond'.
All caps labels must have tracking-widest (0.2em).
Body text should never be pure white (#FFFFFF). Use #E2E8F0 (Slate-200) or similar.

grid_system.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6 md:p-12

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-none px-8 py-3 font-serif tracking-wide transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)]
buttons.outline: border border-white/20 hover:border-white/50 bg-transparent text-foreground rounded-none px-8 py-3 transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-sm

cards.glass: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl hover:border-white/20 transition-colors duration-500

inputs.field: bg-white/5 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 text-foreground placeholder:text-white/20 rounded-none h-12 px-4 transition-all duration-300

navigation.wrapper: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 border-b border-white/5 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-md
navigation.link: text-sm font-medium tracking-widest uppercase hover:text-primary transition-colors

visual_enhancers.noise_overlay: fixed inset-0 z-[9999] pointer-events-none opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-overlay bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]

implementation_steps: Step 1: Install 'lucide-react' and 'framer-motion' (yarn add lucide-react framer-motion).
Step 2: Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the custom colors (void, gold, silver) and fonts.
Step 3: Create a 'Layout.js' component that includes the Noise Overlay and Navbar.
Step 4: Build the 'Hero' component using the 'Nebula Texture' and 'Playfair Display' headings.
Step 5: Implement the 'ChartForm' using Shadcn components but styled with 'glass' utility classes.
Step 6: Develop the 'Dashboard' using the Bento Grid layout.

donots: Do not use gradients on body text.
Do not center text unless it is a short headline.
Do not use rounded-full buttons; stick to rounded-none or rounded-sm for editorial feel.
Avoid bright 'Success Green' or 'Error Red'. Use muted 'Sage' or 'Rose' instead.
dos: ALWAYS add a 'data-testid' to interactive elements.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast against the dark background (use Silver/Grey, not dark grey).
